title: Nykaa Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Nykaa Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail:
Nykaa Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail!
